0.q: BiFC showed that PmABI5 undergoes homologous dimerization in addition to forming a heterodimer with either PmbZIP33 or PmbZIP131.

1.q: BiFC showed that PmABI5 undergoes homologous dimerization in addition to forming a heterodimer with either PmbZIP33 or PmbZIP131.

2.q: Further yeast one-hybrid experiments showed that PmABI5 and PmbZIP131 regulate the expression of PmNAC1 by binding to the G-box in the promoter.

3.q: Further yeast one-hybrid experiments showed that PmABI5 and PmbZIP131 regulate the expression of PmNAC1 by binding to the G-box in the promoter.
